description: Skills for sales and customer-facing work in Claude. Built by a founding AE shipping in public.

plugins.name: follow-up-email
plugins.description: Train Claude on your post-call follow-up email style once, then draft new follow-ups in your voice after every meeting. Reads Granola transcripts and your prior Gmail follow-ups, writes drafts (never sends).
